title: NVIDIA Cosmos 3: The First Open Omni-Model for Physical AI Reasoning and Action
summary: NVIDIA Cosmos 3 is a unified foundation model that integrates world generation, physical reasoning, and action generation into a single omni-model using a Mixture-of-Transformers architecture, replacing the need for separate specialized models. Two variants are released: Cosmos 3 Nano (16B parameters) for efficient edge inference and Cosmos 3 Super (64B) for large-scale deployments targeting robotics, autonomous vehicles, and smart spaces. The model is open-sourced on Hugging Face and is positioned as a generalist Physical AI backbone capable of video-based world simulation and robot action prediction within a single unified system.
